scope: Fix local OpenSpec spec requirement wording so npx OpenSpec validation passes for this repository.
notes: The direct local OpenSpec CLI validates the copied shortcuts OpenSpec tree and found non-normative requirement text in existing specs.
This claim only updates spec wording to include SHALL/MUST; implementation behavior is unchanged.
Direct local validation now passes: rtk npx -y @fission-ai/openspec@latest validate --all --json --strict.
